title: orobus viciiformis var. calcaratus
intro: Orobus viciiformis var. calcaratus, also known as the var. calcaratus of the crested crested clover, is a type of flowering plant in the Fabaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. The health benefits of Orobus viciiformis var. calcaratus include its use in treating menstrual cramps, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Orobus viciiformis var. calcaratus can be found in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
